name: Salad Nicoise
recipeIngredient: 6 large pitted black olives, sliced crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Add the small red potatoes and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until tender. Remove with a slotted spoon and rinse under cold water. Drain well. Coarsely chop the potatoes and add them to a large bowl.
2. Add the trimmed green beans to the boiling water and cook for 3 minutes, just until bright green and tender-crisp. Remove from the water, rinse under cold water, drain, and add to the bowl with the potatoes.
3. Toss the cooked green beans, tuna, and halved cherry tomatoes with the chopped potatoes in the large bowl.
4. Arrange the sliced lettuce leaves on a large serving plate. Create a mound of the potato-tuna mixture in the center.
5. Decoratively arrange the hard-boiled egg quarters, black olives, and anchovy fillets on top of the tuna-potato mixture.
6. In a small bowl, whisk together the red wine vinegar, fresh lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and ground black pepper to create a dressing. Drizzle the dressing over the salad and serve immediately.
